[]: Re: Dear evafags, Kawoshin ain't that bad, girlies             Quote Post by Kiddcorezz » Fri Sep 04, 2020 8:35 pm

[]: Re: Dear evafags, Kawoshin ain't that bad, girlies             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Sep 04, 2020 8:47 pm Shippers in general miss the point of the show, that is including you. If you think that any one ship is magically going to fix every problem Shinji has, you are mistaken. Kawoshin is just as problematic as literally any other pairing in the show. And since you are already becoming patronizing about it - did you watch the same show as people who actually know what they are talking about? It is literally spelled out for you in the title of episode 25. Take care of yourself , and only AFTER that comes I need you . Shinji needs to get over himself before he can even attempt to get into a relationship with anyone else, be that Kaworu, Asuka, Rei or whoever the fuck else. It's really not that hard, yet you people act like basic narrative undertones are fucking rocket science

[]: Re: bingo rebuild             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Sep 04, 2020 8:59 pm These embryonic posts in this new thread are strangely reminiscent of a trollish 4Chan exchange recently linked by Mr. Tines in another thread in the Rebuild subforum. Hm, I wonder..... Anywho, the only real suspicious thing about Kaworu is that the exposition he gives Shinji doesn't quite match up what we see in the canon post credit scene in Eva Ha. For all we know, Kaworu might have simply been misguided, not necessarily evil. (He was also honestly mistaken about the spears in Lilith's back, so...) ---------------------------- EDIT: Wooooow, and the OP changes course and "rewrites history" as soon as I point this out. Very suspicious.

[]: Re: bingo rebuild             Quote Post by Derantor » Fri Sep 04, 2020 9:02 pm

[]: Re: bingo rebuild             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Sep 04, 2020 9:07 pm I'm sure several on here can attest that I'm not even an Asuka fanboy.

[]: Re: bingo rebuild             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Sep 04, 2020 9:08 pm ^ ^ Nice catch.
